findings.summary: One verifier validation run saw a transient FFleet transit-time failure before an immediate clean rerun.
findings.impact: Appears unrelated to SSW-DFH-002 but may indicate non-deterministic suite behavior.

test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: ship-level and attack-result tests cover full Disastrous Fire bundle application, partial reapplication, full hull fallback, and propagation to attack-result consumers; verifier reruns passed SSWTests (174) and TacticalTests (125).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: the existing tactical operations manual already defines the Disastrous Fire entry and the fallback rules governing repeated subsystem hits, so no documentation edit was required.

validation_commands_run.note: An earlier verifier rerun produced a transient unrelated FFleetTest::testDecTransitTime failure at tests/strategic/FFleetTest.cpp:157.
